notes: Fix self-update restart crash (clean PyInstaller env), add a profile picker when 'new profile' is off with the Astra Ducunt logo as the launcher profile icon, auto-detect Windows UI language (Korean/Japanese) with PretendardJP for Japanese, switch the carousel dots to an auto-slide gauge, clamp RAM from 2 GB to system total and turn the button into Update when RAM changes, lighten the UI fonts, and localize install step messages.
